UnitAbilities.Title: Seized Opportunity
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit destroys an enemy unit. If it does, you gain 1YP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cthonian Augmentations
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 6", its Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 5+, and it gains the Feel No Pain 4+ ability. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Cthonian Beserks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Exoarmour
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Save characteristic to 2+, add the Exoarmour keyword, it is equipped with 1 exoarmour grenade launcher in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Einhyr Hearthguard.

UnitAbilities.Title: Exoframe
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Toughness characteristic to 6, and add the Exoframe keyword. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Brôkhyr Thunderkyn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Magna-coil Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 6, and it gains the Scouts 9" ability. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted and Fly keywords, it is equipped with 1 magna-coil autocannon in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Hernkyn Pioneers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Yaegir
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 6", its Save characteristic to 5+, and it gains the Infiltrators ability. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Hernkyn Yaegirs.

UnitAbilities.Title: Exemplar of the Einhyr
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Forgewrought Expertise
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your Movement phase, this unit can repair one friendly Leagues of Votann Vehicle, Exoframe or Ironkin Steeljacks unit within 3" of it. One model in that unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each unit can only be repaired once per turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kindred Hero
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Rampart Crest
UnitAbilities.Text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Teleport Crest
UnitAbilities.Text: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

Infos.Title: WEAPON NOTES
Infos.Text: Conversion: Each time an attack made with this weapon targets an enemy unit that is not within 12", an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Grimnyr's Regard
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly Leagues of Votann unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Magna-coil Bike
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 6, and it gains the Scouts 9" ability. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted and Fly keywords, it is equipped with 1 magna-coil autocannon in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Hernkyn Pioneers.

UnitAbilities.Title: Yaegir
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 6", its Save characteristic to 5+, and it gains the Infiltrators ability. Replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Hernkyn Yaegirs.

UnitAbilities.Title: Barrier Tech Repulsion (Psychic)
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
